rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees involving ports, and in implementation scopes for bindings.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE annexes; avoid package-qualified names not present in the model.
generic_rules: Component type contracts should use assumptions and guarantees that reference visible ports and features.
Implementation contracts should use assign statements for output bindings and avoid guarantee statements.
Ensure all AGREE expressions reference only visible AADL features or declared helpers.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Constants and equations in AGREE should match the data types of visible AADL features.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference non-visible or package-qualified identifiers in AGREE annexes.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
Model analyst extraction of AADL structure
